data.title: Fix: overlay-calibration-baselines.md missing findings count, dismissal rate, and severity distribution
data.description:
## Description
overlay-calibration-baselines.md contains only classifier-level trigger rates.
SC12 requires: findings generated per overlay, blue team dismissal rate for security,
severity distribution for performance. The retrospective script only runs the classifier,
not the actual overlay agents. Requires enhancing run-overlay-retrospective.sh to dispatch
overlay agents on triggered commits and collect the additional metrics.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Baselines include findings count per overlay
  Verify: grep -q "findings.*per.*overlay\|findings.*generated" plugins/dso/docs/overlay-calibration-baselines.md
- [ ] Baselines include blue team dismissal rate
  Verify: grep -q "dismissal\|dismiss" plugins/dso/docs/overlay-calibration-baselines.md
- [ ] Baselines include severity distribution
  Verify: grep -q "severity.*distribution\|critical.*important.*minor" plugins/dso/docs/overlay-calibration-baselines.md
